top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says Dell’s blowout quarter sets up a crucial week for AI stocks
top_signals.summary: CNBC’s Jim Cramer said Dell Technologies’ blockbuster quarter reignited enthusiasm around AI and data center stocks.

top_signals.title: Aave Labs secures dual UK licenses for regulated crypto payments infrastructure through local subsidiary
top_signals.summary: Aave Labs has obtained FCA cryptoasset registration in the U.K. for its Push subsidiaries, unlocking zero-fee fiat on-ramps.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Training Maestro Size set for profitable Sunday at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: 13-TIME champion trainer John Size could be the man to follow when racing gets underway with an 11-race programme, including a couple of Group Three contests at Sha Tin in Hong Kong on Sunday. Size seems to have dropped off the radar with regards winning the trainers’ title race and currently lies 10 winners behind [...]

top_signals.title: Trust in Patch to deliver the goods at Sha Tin
top_signals.summary: WITH the form book suggesting there is little to choose between the majority of the 10 contenders lining-up for the six-furlong Group Three Sha Tin Vase Handicap (10.10am), racing fans can expect a nail-biting finish. top_signals.title: Aluminum’s US comeback hinges on power, not tariffs, environmental advocates say
top_signals.summary: Century Aluminum’s proposed smelter in Oklahoma remains dependent on securing a long-term electricity agreement before construction can begin.
